sqlMap.update: update item set se_id=#se_id#, it_name=#name#, it_name2=#name2#, it_text=#text#, it_text2=#text2#,it_order=#order#, it_pdf1=#pdf1#, it_pdf2=#pdf2#, it_pdf3=#pdf3#, it_pdf1_page=#pdf1_page#,it_pdf2_page=#pdf2_page#,it_pdf3_page=#pdf3_page#, it_cad1=#cad1#, it_cad2=#cad2#, it_cad3=#cad3#, it_img1=#img1#, it_img2=#img2#, it_img3=#img3#, it_link1=#link1#, it_link2=#link2#, it_link3=#link3#, it_link4=#link4#, it_link5=#link5#, it_link6=#link6#, it_link7=#link7#, it_link8=#link8#, it_link9=#link9#, it_link10=#link10#, c1=#c1#, c2=#c2#, c3=#c3#, c4=#c4#, c5=#c5#, c6=#c6#, c7=#c7#, c8=#c8#, c9=#c9#, c10=#c10#, c11=#c11#, c12=#c12#, c13=#c13#, c14=#c14#, c15=#c15#, c16=#c16#, c17=#c17#, c18=#c18#, c19=#c19#, c20=#c20#, c21=#c21#, c22=#c22#, c23=#c23#, c24=#c24#, c25=#c25#, c26=#c26#, c27=#c27#, c28=#c28#, c29=#c29#, c30=#c30#, c31=#c31#, c32=#c32#, c33=#c33#, c34=#c34#, c35=#c35#, c36=#c36#, c37=#c37#, c38=#c38#, c39=#c39#, c40=#c40#, c41=#c41#, c42=#c42#, c43=#c43#, c44=#c44#, c45=#c45#, c46=#c46#, c47=#c47#, c48=#c48#, c49=#c49#, c50=#c50#, it_active=#active#, ctime=#ctime#, mtime=#mtime#, by=#by# , it_sid=#sid#, it_webcatalog=#webcatalog# ,it_lang = #lang# where it_id=#id#
update item set it_order=#order# where it_id=#id#
sqlMap.select: select * from item where it_sid=#sid# and it_id!=#id#
select * from item where se_id=#id# order by se_id,it_order
select count(*) from item where se_id=#id#

select * from item where se_id=#se_id#
$cname$~*#keywords[]#
(it_sid~*#keywords[]# or c1~*#keywords[]# or c2~*#keywords[]# or c3~*#keywords[]# or c4~*#keywords[]# or c5~*#keywords[]# or c6~*#keywords[]# or c7~*#keywords[]# or c8~*#keywords[]# or c9~*#keywords[]# or c10~*#keywords[]# or c11~*#keywords[]# or c12~*#keywords[]# or c13~*#keywords[]# or c14~*#keywords[]# or c15~*#keywords[]# or c16~*#keywords[]# or c17~*#keywords[]# or c18~*#keywords[]# or c19~*#keywords[]# or c20~*#keywords[]# or c21~*#keywords[]# or c22~*#keywords[]# or c23~*#keywords[]# or c24~*#keywords[]# or c25~*#keywords[]# or c26~*#keywords[]# or c27~*#keywords[]# or c28~*#keywords[]# or c29~*#keywords[]# or c30~*#keywords[]# or c31~*#keywords[]# or c32~*#keywords[]# or c33~*#keywords[]# or c34~*#keywords[]# or c35~*#keywords[]# or c36~*#keywords[]# or c37~*#keywords[]# or c38~*#keywords[]# or c39~*#keywords[]# or c40~*#keywords[]# or c41~*#keywords[]# or c42~*#keywords[]# or c43~*#keywords[]# or c44~*#keywords[]# or c45~*#keywords[]# or c46~*#keywords[]# or c47~*#keywords[]# or c48~*#keywords[]# or c49~*#keywords[]# or c50~*#keywords[]#)
order by se_id,it_order
order by $order$,it_order
limit #limit# offset #offset#

select * from item
(it_sid~*#keywords[]# or c1~*#keywords[]# or c2~*#keywords[]# or c3~*#keywords[]# or c4~*#keywords[]# or c5~*#keywords[]# or c6~*#keywords[]# or c7~*#keywords[]# or c8~*#keywords[]# or c9~*#keywords[]# or c10~*#keywords[]# or c11~*#keywords[]# or c12~*#keywords[]# or c13~*#keywords[]# or c14~*#keywords[]# or c15~*#keywords[]# or c16~*#keywords[]# or c17~*#keywords[]# or c18~*#keywords[]# or c19~*#keywords[]# or c20~*#keywords[]# or c21~*#keywords[]# or c22~*#keywords[]# or c23~*#keywords[]# or c24~*#keywords[]# or c25~*#keywords[]# or c26~*#keywords[]# or c27~*#keywords[]# or c28~*#keywords[]# or c29~*#keywords[]# or c30~*#keywords[]# or c31~*#keywords[]# or c32~*#keywords[]# or c33~*#keywords[]# or c34~*#keywords[]# or c35~*#keywords[]# or c36~*#keywords[]# or c37~*#keywords[]# or c38~*#keywords[]# or c39~*#keywords[]# or c40~*#keywords[]# or c41~*#keywords[]# or c42~*#keywords[]# or c43~*#keywords[]# or c44~*#keywords[]# or c45~*#keywords[]# or c46~*#keywords[]# or c47~*#keywords[]# or c48~*#keywords[]# or c49~*#keywords[]# or c50~*#keywords[]#)
order by se_id,it_order
order by $order$,it_order
limit #limit# offset #offset#
